## Type of change

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Linter / formatter reports no errors
- [ ] `.konjo/hooks/pre-commit` (Wall 1) passes
- [ ] No hardcoded absolute/local paths
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or generated artifacts staged for commit
- [ ] Changes are scoped to one logical concern (not a kitchen sink PR)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if this repo keeps one)
